canonical_name: Gang de la Brise de Mer
description: Corsican criminal organization founded in the 1970s, based in Northern Corsica. Controls racketeering, slot machines, money laundering, night clubs, gambling, and casinos in Corsica, southern France, Paris, Italy, Africa, and Latin America. Known for violent robberies and conflicts with rival gangs. Estimated capital between 120 and 150 million euros.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: France (including Corsica , Marseille and Paris ), Italy , North Africa , and Argentina
country_links.context: The gang has territory in Argentina.

country_links.evidence_quote: in Occidental African countries ( Gabon , Mali , Cameroon , etc.)
country_links.context: The gang controls activities in Cameroon.
